name: dung-tools
description: Dung's reusable Claude Code extensions — project-agnostic workflow roles, shared across projects & machines.

plugins.name: roles
plugins.description: Generic CTO (advisor: research → self-sufficient Plan → independent review) and EM (executor: Plan → Coder/Reviewer loop → branch-per-step) role skills. Project-agnostic; project specifics live in each repo's PROJECT_CONTEXT / PROJECT_STATE.
